title: KitchenPerfected 4 Slice Wide Slot Toaster, 7 Browning Settings, Defrost/Reheat/Cancel, High Lift, Centralisation Even Toasting - Anthracite Grey - E2115GR
features: WIDE TOASTING SLOTS: Wider and Deeper slots accommodates popular and larger bread slices as well as crumpets, bagels, and many more. The automatic centralization allows thin and thick bread to be cooked evenly. Slot Size: 125mm wide x 100mm deep x 30mm thickness
STYLISH DESIGN: The anthracite grey finish will look great in any modern or contemporary kitchen.
7 BROWNING CONTROL SETTINGS: Toast your bread to perfection with this easy to use dial. You can choose from levels 1 to 7 for your desired result!

DEFROST/REHEAT/CANCEL: Use the defrost button to add extra time to the toasting process; simply press the button straight after pushing down the carriage lever. This clever function will work out how much extra time your bread needs to fully defrost and then toast to your desired level as chosen on the browning control dial.

SLIDE OUT CRUMB TRAY: Keep your appliance clean and crumb free without making a mess on your counter top! Simply slide the tray out and discard of the crumbs with zero hassle. Not only will this help to clean the appliance but it also reduces the risk of fire.
description: Toast up to four slices of bread at once with this toaster, perfect for larger appetites and family meal times. Equipped with seven browning control settings for toast just the way you like it! The dial which is easy to use can be adjusted from levels 1 to 7 according to your preference. The cancel button; this handy function will turn off the element and pop your toast up immediately which can come in handy when you need to dash or think you may be burning it! Use the defrost button to add extra time to the toasting process; simply press the button straight after pushing down the carriage lever. This clever function will work out how much extra time your bread needs to fully defrost and then toast to your desired level as chosen on the browning control dial. To keep your toaster in good working order and to produce the optimum results you should clean the appliance frequently; the design includes a slide-out crumb tray which can be easily removed allowing you to discard crumbs with zero hassle. Box Includes : KitchenPerfected 4 Slice Toaster Instruction Manual

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Bread Size: 125 x 100mm, Cancel Function, Self Centering Rack, Variable Browning Control
